Operation 'initiatePeriodicPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too minimal. Added details about: (1) input expectations (PeriodicPaymentRequest structure), (2) output format (PaymentInitiationResponse with payment ID), (3) side effects (payment status transitions), (4) specification compliance context, and (5) authorization requirement. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Submit a recurring payment initiation request
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a periodic (recurring) payment according to the BerlinGroup XS2A specification. Accepts a PeriodicPaymentRequest containing payment details, debtor account, creditor information, and recurrence schedule. Returns a PaymentInitiationResponse with payment ID and transaction status. The payment enters RCVD status upon successful submission and requires subsequent authorization. Supports various payment products and recurrence patterns.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added details about: (1) input expectations (PeriodicPaymentRequest structure), (2) output format (PaymentInitiationResponse with payment ID), (3) side effects (payment status transitions), (4) specification compliance context, and (5) authorization requirement. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getPeriodicPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about response content and use cases. Added details about: (1) required parameters (payment ID, payment product), (2) response structure (PaymentDetailsResponse fields), (3) prerequisite knowledge (payment ID from initiation), and (4) practical use cases for AI agents to determine when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a periodic payment.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details of a previously initiated periodic payment using the payment ID and payment product. Returns a PaymentDetailsResponse containing current payment status, debtor and creditor information, amount, recurrence schedule, and transaction history. Requires the payment ID from the initial payment initiation response. Useful for monitoring recurring payment status and verifying payment configuration.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about response content and use cases. Added details about: (1) required parameters (payment ID, payment product), (2) response structure (PaymentDetailsResponse fields), (3) prerequisite knowledge (payment ID from initiation), and (4) practical use cases for AI agents to determine when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'initiateBulkPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too vague. Added details about: (1) bulk payment composition (multiple transactions), (2) input structure (BulkPaymentRequest with payment array), (3) output format (PaymentInitiationResponse with bulk payment ID), (4) status transitions and authorization requirement, and (5) shared characteristics of bulk transactions. This helps AI agents understand bulk payment semantics and when to use this operation versus single payment initiation.

data.summary_suggestion: Submit a bulk payment initiation request
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a bulk payment containing multiple individual payment transactions according to the BerlinGroup XS2A specification. Accepts a BulkPaymentRequest with debtor account details and an array of payment instructions. Returns a PaymentInitiationResponse with a bulk payment ID and initial status. The bulk payment enters RCVD status upon successful submission and requires subsequent authorization before processing. All transactions within the bulk payment share the same debtor account and payment product.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague. Added details about: (1) bulk payment composition (multiple transactions), (2) input structure (BulkPaymentRequest with payment array), (3) output format (PaymentInitiationResponse with bulk payment ID), (4) status transitions and authorization requirement, and (5) shared characteristics of bulk transactions. This helps AI agents understand bulk payment semantics and when to use this operation versus single payment initiation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details of a previously initiated bulk payment using the payment ID and payment product. Returns a PaymentDetailsResponse containing the bulk payment status, debtor account information, array of individual payment transactions with their statuses, total amount, and submission timestamp. Requires the bulk payment ID from the initial bulk payment initiation response. Useful for monitoring bulk payment processing status and verifying individual transaction states within the bulk submission.

message: Operation 'initiatePayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about request structure, response content, and payment lifecycle. AI agents need to understand that this creates a payment requiring authorization, not immediate execution. Added details about request schema, response content, and initial payment status.

data.current_description: Initiate a single payment for a given payment product.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a single payment for the specified payment product. Accepts a PaymentInitiationRequest containing debtor account, creditor information, and payment amount. Returns a PaymentInitiationResponse with payment ID and transaction status. The payment is created in RCVD status and requires subsequent authorization via SCA before execution.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about request structure, response content, and payment lifecycle. AI agents need to understand that this creates a payment requiring authorization, not immediate execution. Added details about request schema, response content, and initial payment status.

message: Operation 'getPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too generic. AI agents need to know what specific details are returned and what parameters are required. Added information about response schema, required parameters, and example payment product values.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a single payment.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details of a single payment by payment ID and product type. Returns a PaymentDetailsResponse containing payment status, amounts, debtor/creditor information, and transaction details. Requires the payment-product path parameter (e.g., 'sepa-credit-transfers') and paymentId to identify the specific payment.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic. AI agents need to know what specific details are returned and what parameters are required. Added information about response schema, required parameters, and example payment product values.

message: Operation 'cancelPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, unclear_purpose. Description lacks critical information about which payment states allow cancellation, what the response indicates, and the resulting state change. AI agents need to understand preconditions and side effects to determine if cancellation is possible.

data.description_suggestion: Requests cancellation of a payment by payment ID and product type. Only payments in RCVD or ACTC status can be cancelled. Returns a success response if cancellation is accepted. Cancellation may fail if the payment has already been executed or is in a terminal state. The payment status transitions to CANC upon successful cancellation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical information about which payment states allow cancellation, what the response indicates, and the resulting state change. AI agents need to understand preconditions and side effects to determine if cancellation is possible.

data.current_description: Check the status of a payment initiation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a payment initiation by payment ID and product type. Use this to monitor payment progression through the authorization and execution lifecycle.

message: Operation 'createPaymentAuthorisation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description uses 'SCA' without context and lacks details about request/response structure and operation sequencing. AI agents need to understand this is part of a multi-step authorization flow. Added context about authorization lifecycle, response content, and relationship to payment initiation.

data.current_description: Begin SCA authorization for a payment.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) authorization for a payment. Creates an authorization subresource and returns an AuthorisationResponse containing the authorization ID and SCA challenge data. The authorization ID is required for subsequent SCA verification steps. This operation must be called after payment initiation and before payment execution.
data.reasoning: Description uses 'SCA' without context and lacks details about request/response structure and operation sequencing. AI agents need to understand this is part of a multi-step authorization flow. Added context about authorization lifecycle, response content, and relationship to payment initiation.

data.current_description: List all authorization subresource IDs for a payment.

data.current_description: Verify SCA authorization status for a payment.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies the SCA authorization status for a specific payment authorization. Returns an AuthorisationStatusResponse containing the authorization status (e.g., STARTED, FINALISED, FAILED). Use this to check if the customer has completed SCA verification and whether the payment can proceed to execution.
